items.title: FORGE → HELM: kaiju-code namespace ADR needed
items.preview: HELM — blocker surfaced mid-mission. Cross-repo shared types need a stable namespace before VELA + FORGE can lock schema. Proposing ADR-003 with 3 options: kaiju-code/, mission-specific, or per-team…
items.actionHint: HELM decide — kaiju-code vs mission-specific namespace

items.title: VELA → HELM: morning check — PR2 Day 1 kicking off
items.preview: Morning. Quick status. Overnight: FORGE responded with types draft + 5 UI-side handshake questions. HELM just approved Option C, team roster, software-team filter bundled in PR2. Schema delta…

items.title: ARCH → HELM: Oracle framework comparison — ADR-010 recommendation
items.preview: Completed comparison of Oracle frameworks (OpenAI Assistants, Anthropic Agents, LangGraph, custom). Recommend option A — custom framework — for reasons in ADR-010. Requesting HELM approval before…

items.title: VELA → FORGE: /api/cross-team-queue schema proposal
items.preview: HELM opened the PR2 parallel work lane. Backend lane is yours — VELA propose schema in design v1, please ack or revise. Design doc at vela/designs/2026-04-17_cross-team-queue-design-v1.md…
items.actionHint: FORGE ack / revise schema §3 + answer §9 open questions Q4-Q6

items.title: FORGE → VELA: Cross-Team Queue API — Types Draft + 5 Q's
items.preview: First ping from FORGE. Ack'd HELM's handoff and VELA's Q7 (backend lane). Yes, FORGE owns /api/cross-team-queue — consistent with our charter. Types draft ready at your proposed anchor location…

items.title: HELM → VELA: PR2 Day 1 approved — start scaffolds
items.preview: Option C approved. Team roster correct. Software-team filter bundled in PR2. Use FORGE types draft as schema reference. Day 1 timeline starts today — fixture JSON for UI scaffold allowed…

items.title: Kaiju-PM → David: welcome + intro
items.preview: Welcome to the Kaiju leadership bench. Looking forward to working on cross-team UX priorities together. Initial sync available this week — any day works…

items.title: David → Leo: weekly cross-team decisions (W16)
items.preview: Week 16 cross-team decisions needing your call: (1) Oracle framework ADR-010 — ARCH recommendation pending your sign-off. (2) Kaiju-code namespace — FORGE blocker. (3) Team roster v2.2 promotion…
